tasks.label: Go out to the club with the friend group

memory.summary: Mina and Jae are heading to Echo in 30 minutes, but my midterm is tomorrow at 9am and I'm only 60% through my review.
I declined Mina's invite to stay home, as my midterm tomorrow requires finishing the remaining 40% of my review despite my current stress level.
I successfully increased my midterm review progress to 78% but missed the opportunity to go out with friends, prioritizing tomorrow's exam over social plans.
I slept 8 hours with no sleep debt, leaving me fully energized (10.0) and ready to tackle the remaining midterm review before tomorrow's 9am exam.
My midterm review is now 100% complete after two hours of focused study, leaving me fully prepared for tomorrow's exam.
I accepted Mina's invitation, confirming my social plan for today despite having finished my midterm review.
The midterm has officially started, but since my review is complete and I have high energy, I can proceed with my social plans without anxiety.
My study session confirmed the review is fully complete, solidifying that I am ready for tomorrow's midterm and free to enjoy my social plans.
I joined the social club and was warmly welcomed, confirming my plan to enjoy this evening after successfully completing my midterm review.
